physical_therapy.prior_function: Ambulated independently without assistive device; mild bradykinesia due to Parkinson's
physical_therapy.current_mobility: Ambulated 50 feet with front-wheeled walker and minimal assist; requires supervision for transfers
physical_therapy.weight_bearing: Weight bearing as tolerated right lower extremity
physical_therapy.recommendation: Patient is a good candidate for inpatient rehabilitation facility (IRF) given Parkinson's disease and deconditioning; recommend transfer to Prairie View Rehabilitation Center for intensive PT/OT
goals: Ambulate 150 feet with walker and supervision
Ascend/descend 3-5 steps with rail and supervision

occupational_therapy.adl_status: Requires minimal assistance for bathing and dressing lower body due to balance and right leg precautions
occupational_therapy.home_safety: Lives with spouse in single-story home; recommend grab bars in shower and clear pathways
